SLOX TASK: Athlete Entertainer — Amelie Chen, 80, Germany, resident Germany. AUM $127,601,868. Risk profile: moderate_aggressive. Current allocation: Public Equity 32%, Fixed Income 25%, Cash 10%, Private Equity 8%. Wealth source: career_earnings (2020). Existing advisory: full_service_broker. Marital status: single, 0 dependents. Recent life events: new_business (minor).

Scope: Short career peak planning, IP monetization, bond/insurance for future income, asset protection trust.

SLOX TASK: Multi Gen Family Office — Robert Koch, 31, Other, resident Other. AUM $2,347,721,232. Risk profile: moderate_conservative. Current allocation: Private Equity 22%, Public Equity 20%, Fixed Income 15%, Real Assets 15%. Wealth source: inherited (1962). Existing advisory: none. Marital status: married, 3 dependents. Recent life events: business_sale (major); relocation (minor); divorce (minor).

Scope: Family office structuring, next-gen education, governance framework, cross-border optimization.
